# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

# ARM template file to create Azure Functions using Managed Identity and grant broad permissions on Storage, Key Vault, SQL Server & Cosmos DB 
parameters:
- name: location
  type: string   # Location for resources (e.g., West Europe)
  default: 'westus'   
resources:
# Create a service principal with permission to all Azure services and access keys in Key Vault, Storage Account & Cosmos DB via Identity Access Management(IAM). This is done using Managed Service Principal for Centralized Authentication.  
- [id]: <service_principal>    # ID of the created service principle  (e.g., sp1)    
type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/identityProviders/roles
properties:
# Define permissions to access Azure services and resources via Manage Identity for Centralized Authentication  
- name: StorageReadWrite
  actions: ['Microsoft.Storage/*']    # Access storage accounts (read & write)    
- name: KeyVaultManagedIdentity
  actions: [ 'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/blobs/write', 'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/keys/delete',  
             'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets/*' ]    # Access Key Vault, Secrets and Blob Storage (read & write)    
- name: SQLManagedIdentity 
  actions: [ '*' ]      # All permissions on Azure resources via Manage Identity for Centralized Authentication  
- name: CosmosDBFullAccess
  actions: ['Microsoft.DocumentDB/locations/*',    // Access all operations in the cosmo db    
            '-*/read', -'/write']       // Read and write to documents (only)     
# Define roles for broad permissions on Azure services  
- name: '<role_name>'  # Role Name e.g., StorageReadWrite, KeyVaultManagedIdentity etc...    
type: Microsoft.Authorization/roles    // Type of the role to be created (e.g., User)     
properties:      
# Define permissions for broad access on Azure services  
- principalId : '<service_principal>'  # ID or ARM reference value e.g, sp1    
members:         
+ [id]: <resource>  // Resource to be granted the role (e.g., /subscriptions/0c568f2a-9ad4-437d-bbee-xxxxxx)
